socialTrends.name: Churchill Capital Corp XI
socialTrends.summary: Frenzy of retail discussions following the announcement of its $2.5 billion blank-check merger with Agility Robotics (maker of Digit). The deal is set to create the first pure-play publicly traded humanoid robotics company on Nasdaq.

socialTrends.name: Space Exploration Technologies Corp.
socialTrends.summary: Massive discussion volume ahead of SpaceX officially joining the Nasdaq-100 index before Tuesday's opening bell. Traders are debating index-fund inflows vs. steep valuations.

socialTrends.name: Advanced Micro Devices Inc.
socialTrends.summary: Trending heavily after Japanese self-driving startup Turing announced it is utilizing AMD's AI GPUs and secured funding from AMD Ventures, challenging Nvidia's dominant market share.

socialTrends.name: Tesla Inc.
socialTrends.summary: Strong debates over high valuation and profit-taking post-delivery beat. High retail engagement following a Nevada safety investigation into a Semi crash.

socialTrends.name: Meta Platforms Inc.
socialTrends.summary: Retail chatter revolves around legal headwinds, including child-addiction lawsuits and international regulatory content purges, which overshadow reports of new AI cloud initiatives.
